headline: Leading Products at BroadSign
summary: Versatile Senior IT Professional offers cross-functional strengths in systems analysis, sales engineering, and software lifecycle management  amassed through over 15 years of experience.

experiences.title: Senior Director, Product Management
experiences.description: Starmount develops software solutions that bring the richness of the web and the power of mobile into the store, where retailers can create more personalized, relevant, and dynamic interactions with customers. From mobile selling to interactive kiosks, our retail solutions transform the store environment to a more connected, engaging shopping experience.

experiences.title: Director of Solutions
experiences.description: BroadSign International Inc. is the worldwide provider of on-demand software solutions for managing Digital Signage/Digital Out-of-Home Networks. Media Networks use our Software as a Service (SaaS) solution to manage their Digital Signage/Digital Out-of-Home Networks sales inventory, scheduling and reporting across unlimited number of locations.
